subcodes.first_line: O thou who art young in years yet rich in talents! I chanted thy supplication unto God and was gladdened by its meanings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا صغیره السن و عظیمه المواهب انی رتلت مناجاتک الی الله و استبشرت بمعانیها
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
